summary: Construction/project management app with fields for Project Manager and Location Contact.

existing_features.title: Add a 'Project Manager' text input field to the ReportForm component in the Project Info section, allowing users to enter the project manager's name. Include this field in the ReportData interface and render it in the generated PDF under the project info section.

Add a 'Location Contact' text input field to the ReportForm component in the Project Info section, allowing users to enter the on-site location contact's name. Include this field in the ReportData interface and render it in the generated PDF under the project info section.
